steps.title: Use the present-time signal
steps.content: The word Today shows that the sentence is describing Paik's current status. The blank therefore needs a present-tense verb in the passive construction considered the first video artist.

steps.title: Reject past and future tense
steps.content: Choice A is future tense. Choice B is past perfect and would need a later past reference point. Choice C is simple past, which conflicts with Today. The remaining choice gives the needed present-tense form. The answer is D.
